creator: andrew@netplex.net
text:
Created attachment 246037
core.txt

Running devmatch (at boot time or after boot) with 10 Xen "xn" interfaces causes a kernel panic crash. With fewer interfaces it does not crash. Adding many interfaces with the system on-line (not running devmatch) does not crash.

Tested and effects 13.2-p4 and 14.0-RC3.
This also cause problems with FreeBSD based apps like OPNsense and PFsense.

Running on XCP 8.2.1 (Xen). Running FreeBSD amd64 GENERIC kernel

